title: 问老师
description_uz: «Bugungi darsni tushundingmi?» — ikki o'quvchining darsdan keyin savol berish haqidagi suhbati. Bu dialog tushunishni tekshirish, savol berish va maqtovni o'rgatadi. Tanish mavzu, sinfda asqotadigan foydali so'zlar. Eshitish va gapirishga ishonch hosil qilish uchun mukammal.
description_ru: «Ты понял сегодняшний урок?» — разговор двух учеников о том, как задать вопрос после занятия. Этот диалог учит проверять понимание, задавать вопросы и хвалить. Близкая тема, полезная лексика для класса. Идеально для тренировки слуха и уверенности в речи.
description_en: «Did you understand today's class?» — two students talking about how to ask the teacher a question. This dialogue teaches checking understanding, asking questions, and giving compliments. Familiar topic, classroom-ready vocabulary. Ideal for listening practice and speaking confidence.

sentences.text_original: 今天的中文课你听懂了吗？
sentences.pinyin: Jīn tiān de Zhōng wén kè nǐ tīng dǒng le ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Did you understand today's Chinese class?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 听懂了一点儿，但是我还有几个问题。
sentences.pinyin: Tīng dǒng le yì diǎnr, dàn shì wǒ hái yǒu jǐ gè wèn tí.
sentences.text_translation: Biroz tushundim, lekin menda hali ham bir nechta savol bor.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Немного понял, но у меня всё ещё есть несколько вопросов.
sentences.text_translation_en: I understood a little, but I still have a few questions.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ wèi shén me bù wèn lǎo shī?
sentences.text_translation_en: Why don't you ask the teacher?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我想问，可是下课以后老师很忙。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng wèn, kě shì xià kè yǐ hòu lǎo shī hěn máng.
sentences.text_translation: So'ramoqchiman, lekin darsdan keyin o'qituvchi juda band ekan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я хочу спросить, но после урока учитель очень занят.
sentences.text_translation_en: I want to ask, but after class the teacher is very busy.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那明天上课以前，我们一起问老师吧。
sentences.pinyin: Nà míng tiān shàng kè yǐ qián, wǒ men yì qǐ wèn lǎo shī ba.
sentences.text_translation: Unda ertaga darsdan oldin o'qituvchidan birga so'raylik.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда завтра перед уроком давай вместе спросим учителя.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then tomorrow before class, let's ask the teacher together.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo. Nǐ yě yǒu wèn tí ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо. У тебя тоже есть вопрос?
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay. Do you also have a question?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 有。我不明白这个字怎么读。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu. Wǒ bù míng bai zhè ge zì zěn me dú.
sentences.text_translation: Bor. Bu iyeroglif qanday o'qilishini tushunmayapman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Есть. Я не понимаю, как читается этот иероглиф.
sentences.text_translation_en: I do. I don't understand how to read this character.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zhī dào, zhè ge zì dú "xīn".
sentences.text_translation: Men bilaman, bu iyeroglif "xin" deb o'qiladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я знаю, этот иероглиф читается как «xīn».
sentences.text_translation_en: I know, this character is read as "xīn".
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Xiè xie. Nǐ Zhōng wén xué de hěn hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Rahmat. Sen Xitoy tilini juda yaxshi o'rganyapsan ekan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Спасибо. Ты очень хорошо учишь китайский.
sentences.text_translation_en: Thanks. You're learning Chinese very well.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 哪里哪里，我还有好多东西要学习。
sentences.pinyin: Nǎli nǎli, wǒ hái yǒu hǎoduō dōngxi yào xuéxí.
sentences.text_translation: Yo'g'e. Men hali juda ko'p narsa o'rganishim kerak.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да что ты, мне ещё многому нужно учиться.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not at all, I still have a lot to learn.
sentences.speaker: B
